Strange World (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $39,089,002Details
International Box Office $35,652,677
Worldwide Box Office $74,741,679
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,236,139
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,222,766
Total $2,458,905
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The film follows a legendary family of explorers, the Clades, as they attempt to navigate an uncharted, treacherous land alongside a motley crew that includes a mischievous blob, a three-legged dog and a slew of ravenous creatures.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$12,151,384 (31.1% of total gross)
Legs:3.22 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:52.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$180,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,174 opening theaters/4,174 max. theaters, 4.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $43,077,564

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 23rd, 2022 (Wide) by Walt Disney
International Releases: November 22nd, 2022 (Wide), released as Strange World (Странный мир) (Russia (CIS))
November 23rd, 2022 (Wide) (South Korea)
November 23rd, 2022 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
November 23rd, 2022 (Wide) (Netherlands)
November 23rd, 2022 (Wide) (Belgium)
Video Release: December 23rd, 2022 by Disney+
MPA Rating: PG for action/peril and some thematic elements.
(Rating bulletin 2752 (cert #53990), 10/5/2022)
Running Time: 102 minutes
Plot point: Dysfunctional Family, Explorer, Father’s Footsteps, Missing Person
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Digital Animation
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Walt Disney Pictures, Walt Disney Animation Studios
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
